# Chase Sapphire

## ⚠️ Card Identity

- Issuer: Chase
- Network: Visa
- Family: Sapphire
- Variant: Preferred (best-supported match)
- Note: input is ambiguous between Sapphire Preferred and Sapphire Reserve

## 📊 Rate Summary

- Base rate: 1x on all purchases
- Rates shown for Preferred variant (best-supported match)

## 📈 Earning Categories

1. Dining — 3x, unconfirmed (variant ambiguity)

## 🚫 Caps And Exclusions

- Variant ambiguity: input may refer to Reserve instead (conflicting)

## 📋 Confidence Notes

- Input is ambiguous between Sapphire Preferred and Sapphire Reserve.
